case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. MIKE SIMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, COST BILL $269.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MIKE
